meta.title: 婚姻家庭观念变迁
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on changing marriage and family concepts in Chinese: idioms, generational conflict, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 결혼·가족관 변천 담화: 성어, 세대 갈등, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「门当户对」is an idiom describing marriage between families of similar social and economic status.
explanation.ko: 「门当户对」는 사회적·경제적 지위가 비슷한 집안 간의 결혼을 뜻하는 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「门当户对」是什么意思？(What does 门当户对 mean?)
choices: 门当户对(matching family social/economic status for marriage)

explanation.en: 「丁克家庭」(dīngkè jiātíng, from "DINK": Double Income No Kids) refers to a couple who voluntarily chooses not to have children.
explanation.ko: 「丁克家庭」(dīngkè jiātíng)는 자발적으로 자녀를 갖지 않기로 선택한 부부 가정을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「丁克家庭」是什么意思？(What does 丁克家庭 mean?)
choices: 主动选择不生育子女的夫妻家庭(a couple who chooses not to have children)

explanation.en: 「养儿防老」is a traditional idea meaning "raising children to provide for old age".
explanation.ko: 「养儿防老」는 '자식을 길러 노후를 대비한다'는 전통적 관념을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「养儿防老」是什么意思？(What does 养儿防老 mean?)
choices: 传统观念中认为抚养子女是为了老年时能得到赡养(the traditional idea that raising children ensures support in old age)
主张独立自主的晚年生活

explanation.en: 「代际观念冲突」refers to the clash of values and lifestyles between different generations.
explanation.ko: 「代际观念冲突」는 세대 간 가치관·생활방식의 충돌을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「代际观念冲突」是什么意思？(What does 代际观念冲突 mean?)
choices: 不同世代之间价值观和生活方式的碰撞(the clash of values and lifestyles between different generations)

explanation.en: 「核心家庭」(héxīn jiātíng) means "nuclear family", consisting only of parents and their children.
explanation.ko: 「核心家庭」(héxīn jiātíng)는 부모와 자녀로만 구성된 '핵가족'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「核心家庭」是什么意思？(What does 核心家庭 mean?)
choices: 核心家庭(nuclear family — parents and children only)

explanation.en: 「门当户对」describes marriage between families of similar status.
explanation.ko: 「门当户对」는 비슷한 지위의 집안 간 결혼을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 过去，婚姻讲究___，如今这一观念已逐渐被自由恋爱所取代。(In the past, marriage emphasized families of matching status; nowadays this concept has gradually been replaced by free choice in love.)

explanation.en: 「丁克家庭」means "a couple who chooses not to have children".
explanation.ko: 「丁克家庭」는 무자녀 부부 가정을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 越来越多的年轻夫妇选择成为___，追求二人世界的自由与充实。(More and more young couples are choosing to become a DINK family, pursuing the freedom and fulfillment of a life for two.)

explanation.en: 「养儿防老」means "raising children for old-age support".
explanation.ko: 「养儿防老」는 '자식을 길러 노후를 대비한다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 传统的___观念在现代社会保障体系日益完善的背景下，正逐渐发生转变。(The traditional concept of "raising children to provide for old age" is gradually changing against the backdrop of an increasingly comprehensive modern social security system.)
choices: 主张独立自主的晚年生活

explanation.en: 「代际观念冲突」means "clash of values between generations".
explanation.ko: 「代际观念冲突」는 세대 간 가치관 충돌을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 父母与子女在婚恋观上的差异，常常引发激烈的___。(Differences in views on marriage and relationships between parents and children often trigger intense intergenerational conflicts of ideas.)

explanation.en: 「核心家庭」means "nuclear family".
explanation.ko: 「核心家庭」는 '핵가족'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 随着社会结构的变迁，___逐渐取代传统大家庭，成为主流的家庭形式。(With changes in social structure, the nuclear family has gradually replaced the traditional extended family, becoming the mainstream family form.)

explanation.en: 「折射」means "to reflect/mirror".
explanation.ko: 「折射」는 '반영하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这些新兴的家庭形态___了传统婚姻观念正在经历的深刻变革。(These emerging family forms reflect the profound transformation traditional marriage concepts are undergoing.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，___不如以开放包容的心态理解多元化的家庭形式。(Rather than rigidly clinging to traditional concepts of marriage and family, it's better to understand diverse family forms with an open and inclusive mindset.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这对夫妻___面临着来自双方父母的巨大压力，___依然坚持自己选择不生育的决定。(Even though this couple faces enormous pressure from both sets of parents, they still stick to their decision not to have children.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 婚姻家庭观念之所以在近几十年发生了巨大变化，___是因为社会经济结构与个人价值观都经历了深刻转型。(The reason concepts of marriage and family have changed enormously in recent decades is precisely because both socioeconomic structure and individual values have undergone profound transformation.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，___更容易在家庭生活中同心协力。(Once a couple reaches shared values and consensus, they can more easily work together in harmony in family life.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，婚姻家庭观念的变迁___反映了个人自主意识的不断增强。(In the final analysis, the transformation of marriage and family concepts still reflects the continuous strengthening of individual autonomy.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，经济独立与思想解放___推动着当代婚姻家庭观念的深刻转型。(From this we can see that both economic independence and intellectual liberation jointly drive the profound transformation of contemporary concepts of marriage and family.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，年轻一代___更加注重婚姻中的情感契合，而非单纯的物质条件。(As everyone knows, the younger generation often places more emphasis on emotional compatibility in marriage, rather than purely material conditions.)

explanation.en: 「在于」(zàiyú) means "to lie in/consist of".
explanation.ko: 「在于」(zàiyú)는 '~에 있다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这场家庭矛盾的核心，其实___是两代人对婚姻责任理解的差异。(The core of this family conflict is, in fact, the difference between two generations' understanding of marital responsibility.)

explanation.en: 「抵制」(dǐzhì) means "to resist/reject".
explanation.ko: 「抵制」(dǐzhì)는 '저항하다, 거부하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 越来越多的年轻人___传统的婚育压力，选择按照自己的节奏规划人生。(More and more young people are resisting traditional pressure to marry and have children, choosing to plan their lives at their own pace.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 以开放包容的心态理解〜: 不如以〜理解 (not 理解不如以〜).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '以开放包容的心态理解〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如以〜理解'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，理解不如以开放包容的心态多元化的家庭形式。(Rather than rigidly clinging to traditional concepts of marriage and family, it's better to understand diverse family forms with an open and inclusive mindset.) — find the error
choices: 与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，不如以开放包容的心态理解多元化的家庭形式。
与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，理解不如以开放包容的心态多元化的家庭形式。
与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，不如理解以开放包容的心态多元化的家庭形式。
与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，以开放包容的心态不如理解多元化的家庭形式。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 婚姻家庭观念之所以在近几十年发生了巨大变化，因为是社会经济结构与个人价值观都经历了深刻转型。(The reason concepts of marriage and family have changed enormously in recent decades is precisely because both socioeconomic structure and individual values have undergone profound transformation.) — find the error
choices: 婚姻家庭观念之所以在近几十年发生了巨大变化，是因为社会经济结构与个人价值观都经历了深刻转型。
婚姻家庭观念之所以在近几十年发生了巨大变化，因为是社会经济结构与个人价值观都经历了深刻转型。
婚姻家庭观念之所以在近几十年发生了巨大变化，是社会经济结构因为与个人价值观都经历了深刻转型。
婚姻家庭观念之所以在近几十年发生了巨大变化，社会经济结构是因为与个人价值观都经历了深刻转型。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，更容易才在家庭生活中同心协力。(Once a couple reaches shared values and consensus, they can more easily work together in harmony in family life.) — find the error
choices: 一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，就更容易在家庭生活中同心协力。
一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，更容易才在家庭生活中同心协力。
一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，才更容易在家庭生活中同心协力。
一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，更容易在才家庭生活中同心协力。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，不如以开放包容的心态理解多元化的家庭形式 ("Rather than rigidly clinging to traditional concepts of marriage and family, it's better to understand diverse family forms with an open and inclusive mindset").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，不如以开放包容的心态理解多元化的家庭形式' (전통적인 결혼·가족관을 고수하느니 차라리 열린 마음으로 다양한 가족 형태를 이해하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守传统的婚姻家庭观念，__________多元化的家庭形式。(Rather than rigidly clinging to traditional concepts of marriage and family, it's better to understand diverse family forms with an open and inclusive mindset.)
words: 不如以开放包容的心态理解
questions.answer: 不如以开放包容的心态理解

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，就更容易在家庭生活中同心协力 ("Once a couple reaches shared values and consensus, they can more easily work together in harmony in family life").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，就更容易在家庭生活中同心协力' (부부는 일단 공통된 가치관에 합의하면 가정생활에서 더 쉽게 한마음으로 협력할 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一对夫妻一旦达成了共同的价值共识，__________在家庭生活中同心协力。(Once a couple reaches shared values and consensus, they can more easily work together in harmony in family life.)
